nodes.name: Alert Settings
nodes.notes: EDIT ME: type your Slack channel ID here. The record is already stored before this step.

parameters.content:
## 🛠 Setup (1 minute)
1. Open **Alert Settings** and type your Slack channel ID.
2. Click **Notify Dead Letter Stored** and connect your Slack account.
3. Publish this workflow.

Other workflows call this one to store failed payloads. To send a payload here, add an **Execute Workflow** node on any error branch and map: source_workflow, event_key, payload (and optionally error_message, failed_node, replay_target_url).

nodes.name: Notify Dead Letter Stored
nodes.notes: Alerting is best-effort. The record is already stored; a Slack outage must not fail the write.
